component.name: MainScene

Label.text: Use this code on your setup website

component.script:
sub init() m.video = m.top.findNode("videoPlayer") m.categoryList = m.top.findNode("categoryList") m.channelList = m.top.findNode("channelList") m.infoTitle = m.top.findNode("infoTitle") m.infoMeta = m.top.findNode("infoMeta")
m.setupOverlay = m.top.findNode("setupOverlay") m.setupStatus = m.top.findNode("setupStatus") m.deviceCode = m.top.findNode("deviceCodeValue").text m.apiBase = "http://192.168.1.81:3001" m.activationTask = invalid m.isRefreshing = false m.refreshTimeoutTimer = m.top.findNode("refreshTimeoutTimer") buildCategories() m.categoryList.observeField("itemFocused", "onCategoryFocus") m.channelList.observeField("itemFocused", "onChannelFocus")
m.top.findNode("activateButton").observeField("buttonSelected", "onActivatePressed") m.top.findNode("refreshButton").observeField("buttonSelected", "onRefreshPressed") m.top.findNode("closeSetupButton").observeField("buttonSelected", "onCloseSetup") m.refreshTimeoutTimer.observeField("fire", "onRefreshTimeout")
m.top.findNode("activateButton").setFocus(true) updateChannelsAndGuide("Movies") end sub sub onCloseSetup() m.setupOverlay.visible = false m.categoryList.setFocus(true) end sub
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if not press then return false if m.setupOverlay = invalid or m.setupOverlay.visible = false then return false
activateBtn = m.top.findNode("activateButton") refreshBtn = m.top.findNode("refreshButton") closeBtn = m.top.findNode("closeSetupButton")
if key = "OK" or key = "select" then if activateBtn.hasFocus() then onActivatePressed() return true end if if refreshBtn.hasFocus() then onRefreshPressed() return true end if if closeBtn.hasFocus() then onCloseSetup() return true end if end if
if key = "back" then onCloseSetup() return true end if
if key = "right" then if activateBtn.hasFocus() then refreshBtn.setFocus(true) return true end if if refreshBtn.hasFocus() then closeBtn.setFocus(true) return true end if end if
if key = "left" then if closeBtn.hasFocus() then refreshBtn.setFocus(true) return true end if if refreshBtn.hasFocus() then activateBtn.setFocus(true) return true end if end if
return false end function sub onActivatePressed() m.setupStatus.text = "Go to your website and enter code " + m.top.findNode("deviceCodeValue").text end sub sub onRefreshPressed() if m.isRefreshing then m.setupStatus.text = "Still checking..." return end if
m.isRefreshing = true m.setupStatus.text = "Checking activation..."
ensureActivationTask()
m.activationTask.apiBase = m.apiBase m.activationTask.deviceCode = m.deviceCode m.activationTask.control = "RUN"
sleep(3000)
if m.isRefreshing then m.isRefreshing = false m.setupStatus.text = "Server not responding. Try again." end if end sub
sub hideSetupFields() end sub
function setupFieldsVisible() as Boolean return false end function
sub ensureActivationTask() if m.activationTask <> invalid then return
m.activationTask = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ActivationCheckTask") m.activationTask.observeField("responseJson", "onActivationTaskResponse") m.activationTask.observeField("errorMessage", "onActivationTaskError") end sub
sub onActivationTaskResponse() if m.activationTask = invalid then return
response = m.activationTask.responseJson if response = invalid or response = "" then return
m.isRefreshing = false m.refreshTimeoutTimer.control = "stop"
if Instr(1, response, """ok"":true") > 0 then m.setupStatus.text = "Activated!" m.setupOverlay.visible = false m.categoryList.setFocus(true) else m.setupStatus.text = "Not activated yet." end if end sub
sub onActivationTaskError() if m.activationTask = invalid then return
err = m.activationTask.errorMessage if err = invalid or err = "" then return
m.isRefreshing = false m.refreshTimeoutTimer.control = "stop" m.setupStatus.text = err end sub
sub onRefreshTimeout() if m.isRefreshing then m.isRefreshing = false m.setupStatus.text = "Server took too long. Try Refresh again." end if end sub
sub buildCategories() content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode")
addListItem(content, "Movies") addListItem(content, "Sports") addListItem(content, "News") addListItem(content, "Family")
m.categoryList.content = content end sub
sub addListItem(parent as Object, title as String) item = parent.CreateChild("ContentNode") item.title = title end sub
sub onCategoryFocus() item = m.categoryList.content.getChild(m.categoryList.itemFocused) if item <> invalid updateChannelsAndGuide(item.title) end if end sub
sub onChannelFocus() item = m.channelList.content.getChild(m.channelList.itemFocused) if item <> invalid playChannel(item) end if end sub
sub updateChannelsAndGuide(category as String) buildChannels(category) buildGuide(category)
firstChannel = m.channelList.content.getChild(0) if firstChannel <> invalid playChannel(firstChannel) end if end sub
sub buildChannels(category as String) content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode")
if category = "Movies" addChannel(content, "101 5 STARMAX") addChannel(content, "102 ACTIONMAX") addChannel(content, "103 MOVIES HD") addChannel(content, "104 CINEMA PLUS") else if category = "Sports" addChannel(content, "201 ESPN") addChannel(content, "202 beIN SPORTS") addChannel(content, "203 SPORTS NET") addChannel(content, "204 FOX SPORTS") else if category = "News" addChannel(content, "301 CNN") addChannel(content, "302 FOX NEWS") addChannel(content, "303 MSNBC") addChannel(content, "304 NEWSMAX") else addChannel(content, "401 HALLMARK") addChannel(content, "402 LIFETIME") addChannel(content, "403 TLC") addChannel(content, "404 FAMILY TV") end if
m.channelList.content = content end sub
sub addChannel(parent as Object, title as String) item = parent.CreateChild("ContentNode") item.title = title item.addField("url", "string", true) item.url = "https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8" end sub
sub buildGuide(category as String) color = "0x7b5d88FF" if category = "Sports" color = "0x356b8cFF" else if category = "News" color = "0x2e4f8fFF" else if category = "Family" color = "0x4f7a5aFF" end if
m.top.findNode("p11").color = color m.top.findNode("p12").color = color m.top.findNode("p21").color = color m.top.findNode("p22").color = color m.top.findNode("p31").color = color m.top.findNode("p32").color = color m.top.findNode("p41").color = color m.top.findNode("p42").color = color
if category = "Movies" setRowLabels("5 STARMAX", "ACTIONMAX", "MOVIES HD", "CINEMA PLUS") setProgramTexts("A Hard Day's Night", "Margaret", "The 33", "Movie Feature", "Classic Film", "Drama Hour", "Indie", "Saturday Feature") else if category = "Sports" setRowLabels("ESPN", "beIN SPORTS", "SPORTS NET", "FOX SPORTS") setProgramTexts("SportsCenter", "Live Match", "Tennis", "Postgame", "Golf Hour", "Live Soccer", "Boxing", "Highlights") else if category = "News" setRowLabels("CNN", "FOX NEWS", "MSNBC", "NEWSMAX") setProgramTexts("Noon News", "Update", "Politics", "News Block", "World Report", "Panel", "Markets", "Evening Lead") else setRowLabels("HALLMARK", "LIFETIME", "TLC", "FAMILY TV") setProgramTexts("Family Hour", "Movie", "Reality", "Lifestyle", "Cartoon Time", "Home Show", "Cooking", "Weekend Special") end if end sub
sub setRowLabels(a as String, b as String, c as String, d as String) m.top.findNode("rowLabel1").text = a m.top.findNode("rowLabel2").text = b m.top.findNode("rowLabel3").text = c m.top.findNode("rowLabel4").text = d end sub
sub setProgramTexts(a as String, b as String, c as String, d as String, e as String, f as String, g as String, h as String) m.top.findNode("p11t").text = a m.top.findNode("p12t").text = b m.top.findNode("p21t").text = c m.top.findNode("p22t").text = d m.top.findNode("p31t").text = e m.top.findNode("p32t").text = f m.top.findNode("p41t").text = g m.top.findNode("p42t").text = h end sub
sub playChannel(channel as Object) content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") content.url = channel.url content.streamformat = "hls" m.video.content = content m.video.control = "play" m.infoTitle.text = channel.title m.infoMeta.text = "Live stream • StreamLine BluTV" end sub
